product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message:
Hello,

I hope you're doing well! I came across your listing for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV and I must say, I'm quite impressed with the features it offers. I was wondering if there is any room for negotiation on the price? 

Looking forward to hearing from you soon. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message:
Hello,

I'm glad to hear you're interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV! It's a top-of-the-line product with amazing features. While I can't go below the wholesale price of $1,100, I can offer you a competitive deal. Let me know what you have in mind. Thank you for considering our product!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer. I appreciate your willingness to negotiate. Unfortunately, I have a strict budget of $1449.50 for this purchase, so I won't be able to meet your offer. Thank you for your time.
